title: AN ACT TO DECLARE BARRIO CABAROAN OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF SAN EMILIO, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, AS THE SEAT OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT GOVERNMENT OF THE SAID MUNICIPAL DISTRICT.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3576 / 59 OG No. 49, 8348 (December 9, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3744, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT TO DECLARE BARRIO CABAROAN OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT OF SAN EMILIO, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, AS THE SEAT OF THE MUNICIPAL DISTRICT GOVERNMENT OF THE SAID MUNICIPAL DISTRICT.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Barrio Cabaroan of the Municipal District of San Emilio, Province of Ilocos Sur, is hereby declared as the seat of the municipal district government of the said municipal district.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
